title: rekeb #7393
definition:
1) a team, chariot, chariotry, mill-stone, riders
    1a) chariotry, chariots
    1b) chariot (single)
    1c) upper millstone (as riding on lower millstone)
    1d) riders, troop (of riders), horsemen, pair of horsemen, men
        riding, ass-riders, camel-riders
